creator: brfr@metrico.lu
text:
Hi,

I can confirm this happening too. openjdk6-b27_2 and openjdk6-jre-b27_4 
are installed, but I still get the configure error.

There's a mapserver bug report on this too, but they claim it's a java 
issue.


Frank
